creator: paul.g.webster@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #3)

My apologies, standard ZFS filesystem (hosting gpart/UFS on the vdev), bhyve had zroot/venv/store/paul.daemon.space-extended  mounted.

I have some testing to do with bhyve and snd-hda next weekend so I will also get some more debug information for this problem also
